hyperedges.label: Panel placement pipeline (cm UI -> mm internal -> grid placement)
Crop selection -> capture -> roof edit flow

nodes.label: Auto Module Placement
nodes.rationale: Tries Portrait and Landscape orientations and auto-adopts the one that fits more panels

nodes.label: Eave Parallel Layout
nodes.rationale: Aligns grid parallel to eave edge designated by flowSetting for natural water-flow direction

nodes.label: Placement Constants (GAP_CM, MARGIN_CM)
nodes.rationale: GAP_CM=0.3 (3mm) and MARGIN_CM=30 (300mm) are hard-coded in page.tsx, not exposed as UI inputs

nodes.label: Styling Rules (CSS Custom Properties)
nodes.rationale: Uses CSS custom properties via inline styles instead of Tailwind utility classes

nodes.label: Props-Down / Callbacks-Up Pattern
nodes.rationale: page.tsx owns all state and passes via props to keep state management centralized

nodes.label: No Test Framework
nodes.rationale: Currently no test framework configured; verification via lint, tsc --noEmit, and pnpm build

nodes.label: Conditional .claude/rules/ Loading
nodes.rationale: Detailed architecture info auto-loaded from .claude/rules/ based on work context to reduce noise

nodes.label: Korean Response Rule
nodes.rationale: All answers and reasoning written in Korean per user preference

nodes.label: Post-Task Lint/Type/Build Checks
nodes.rationale: Sub-agent runs lint, type, and build checks at task completion to catch errors early

nodes.label: Commit Message Convention
nodes.rationale: English prefix + Korean title/body for clarity in mixed-language team

nodes.label: Coordinate Conversion (lat/lng <-> meters)
nodes.rationale: Latitude correction (cos(lat)) preserves accurate distance calculations across globe

nodes.label: Polygon Inset Algorithm
nodes.rationale: ensureCCW + normal vector offset + line intersection prevents self-intersection via signedArea > 0 check

nodes.label: Grid Placement Strategy
nodes.rationale: Aligns grid to longest edge to maximize panels along natural rectangular shape

nodes.label: Docker Deployment Architecture
nodes.rationale: Multi-stage build with non-root nextjs user for security and minimal runtime image

nodes.label: Context Management Concept
nodes.rationale: AI performance degradation comes from irrelevant info obscuring core rules, not absolute info volume

nodes.label: McDonald's Manual Analogy
nodes.rationale: Role-based manual separation provides only relevant info to each worker, increasing focus

nodes.label: Front Matter Conditional Loading
nodes.rationale: Globs in .claude/rules/ activate rules only for matching file paths, reducing root memory size up to 80%

nodes.label: uv Tool Installation
nodes.rationale: uv installs isolated Python 3.10+ without touching system Python (which is typically 3.9 on macOS)

nodes.label: Project Always-On Integration
nodes.rationale: PreToolUse hook injects graph guidance before grep/find calls so Claude consults graph before searching raw files

nodes.label: graphify-out gitignore Policy
nodes.rationale: Cache and manifest are local-only (mtime-based, invalid after clone); graph.json optionally committed for shared team context

nodes.label: Address Search Sequence
nodes.rationale: 300ms debounce reduces API calls during rapid typing

nodes.label: Polygon Editing Sequence
nodes.rationale: areasRef.current avoids stale closure when handling edit events

nodes.label: Roof Crop & Polygon Editor Plan
nodes.rationale: Replaces direct map polygon drawing with crop-then-popup workflow for clearer step-by-step UX

nodes.label: Polygon UX Improvements Plan
nodes.rationale: State machine sub-mode (idle/selected/moving/editing_vertices) cleanly separates input handling logic

nodes.label: Drawing Undo Feature
nodes.rationale: Right-click on PC and floating button for touch enables consistent undo behavior across input devices

nodes.label: Vertex Editing (Move/Add/Delete)
nodes.rationale: 12px hit radius accommodates touch input while 6px visual radius keeps display clean; double-click on PC and 500ms long-press on touch for delete

nodes.label: Canvas-Based Polygon Editor
nodes.rationale: Canvas chosen over DOM/SVG for lightweight rendering and unified mouse+touch via Pointer Events

nodes.label: Pixel to Lat/Lng Conversion
nodes.rationale: Proportional calculation based on crop bounds with y-axis flip handles canvas coordinate inversion

nodes.label: Map Point Marker
nodes.description: Red gradient (F78488 to DD5155) teardrop-shaped map pin marker with white circular center, 43x61 SVG viewBox. Likely used as a Google Maps location/point marker in the solar PV planner UI.

hyperedges.label: Panel placement pipeline (cm UI -> mm internal -> grid placement)
Crop selection -> capture -> roof edit flow
